title: Gradient table key: C 8-byte IID vs Python/Rust 16-byte address (same-IID destinations collapse in C)
description: Python gradient.py:117-124 and Rust gradient.rs:149-153 key gradient entries by full 16-byte IPv6 address; C gradient.c:56-60 (fed by router.c:162-169) keys by 8-byte IID. Same-IID/different-prefix destinations (e.g. link-local vs ULA forms of the same node) collapse into one entry only in C - route-metric leakage across scopes. Fix: key C by full address (or define IID-keying as canonical and make Py/Rust match - recommend full-address).
